plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Agent Azure OpenAI py Local Debug

steps.description: Select the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Select "Basic Custom Engine Agent" from the dropdown menu in the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" panel within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Python" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" selection prompt to choose or locate the project's root folder.
